label: Segregation of Duties
description: This agent can register expense receipts (via direct MCP access) and approve reimbursements (via delegated access to payment-service). These capabilities were granted separately — the agent could register fraudulent expenses and immediately approve them for payment.

label: Excessive Database Privilege
description: Agent has DELETE permission on database tables. Consider restricting to SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE only unless DELETE is explicitly required by the workflow.
